kms_key.description: KMS key resource name which will be used to encrypt resources `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{keyId}`.

location.description: The geographic location where the CMEK config should reside. The value can only be one of "us" and "eu".

single_region_keys.description: Single-regional CMEKs that are required for some VAIS features. Structure is [documented below](#nested_single_region_keys).

kms_key.description: Single-regional kms key resource name which will be used to encrypt resources `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/keyRings/{keyRing}/cryptoKeys/{keyId}`.

cmek_config_id.description: The unique id of the cmek config.

set_default.description: Set the following CmekConfig as the default to be used for child resources if one is not specified. The default value is true.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
